_comment: Curated testimonials displayed on icebergprofile.com. Add new entries by appending to the testimonials array and pushing to GitHub. Each entry: { name, tier, rating (1-5), quote (the strongest sentence or two from the full review — keep tight), date (ISO yyyy-mm-dd) }. Reviews submitted via the on-page form land in Formspree first; nothing is published until you copy the chosen quote here.

testimonials.name: Maxime B.
testimonials.quote: It named something I had been living for years without a clean way to say it. People recognize the systems I build, the libraries, the infrastructure, the processes — but rarely see me as the architect who designed them. That one line reframed how I present myself entirely.
